Package simpaths.model.taxes

Class DonorTaxUnitPolicy

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.taxes.DonorTaxUnitPolicy
@Entity public class DonorTaxUnitPolicy extends Object
CLASS TO STORE TAX-UNIT-LEVEL POLICY-DEPENDENT DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
